project_type: TypeScript/Node.js monorepo (apps + packages + services) managed with Turborepo + pnpm
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turbo. Root scripts: pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, pnpm test, pnpm lint. Turbo config in turbo.json.
test_framework: vitest (root vitest.config.ts + per-package configs), playwright for E2E
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install (update lockfile if deps change), 2. pnpm typecheck, 3. pnpm turbo test, 4. pnpm turbo build --concurrency=3, 5. pnpm lint
snapshot_or_generated_files: pnpm-lock.yaml (regenerated by pnpm install when package.json changes)
setup_instructions: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile (or pnpm install if lockfile needs updating)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Node v22, pnpm 10.28.1. No Docker daemon needed for this task.
contribution_requirements: Follow conventional commits. CI runs: lint:strict, typecheck, test, build.
key_patterns: OpenTelemetry SDK used in packages/observability/src/sdk/. Resource from @opentelemetry/resources used with new Resource({...}) pattern. MeterProvider from @opentelemetry/sdk-metrics. NodeSDK from @opentelemetry/sdk-node.
directory_structure: apps/ (9 apps), packages/ (shared libs including observability, auth, database, etc.), services/ (microservices), .github/workflows/ (CI configs)
